name: Potato Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 tart apples, pared, cored, and cut into slices
½ head roasted garlic, cloves chopped fine
recipeInstructions:
1. In a stock pot, layer onion rings and pour in 1 cup of vegetable stock.
2. Cook until beginning to get transparent (do not stir).
3. Layer potatoes over onions and cover with more stock if needed; steam for about 10-15 minutes or until the potatoes begin to become soft.
4. Add sage, apple slices, and mushrooms on top. Continue cooking another 5 minutes.
5. Mix in garlic.
6. Transfer the mixture to a casserole dish (spray with Pam or wipe with a small amount of oil if desired).
7. Refrigerate overnight (if time allows).
8. Bake at 350°F until browned on top and heated through.
Serve with lentils cooked with tomato sauce and green beans, and a dark leafy salad or greens cooked your favorite way (escarole, simmered in broth with lots of garlic!).
